name: tracerelay
description: Self-evolving schema runtime plugin for structured profiling, prior-work continuation, and change inspection in local LLM workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Task-first schema evolution, memory recall, and lineage tracing for local LLM workflows
interface.longDescription: Run TraceRelay inside Codex as a repo-local plugin. The plugin connects to the running docker-compose MCP server, exposes task evolution and memory tools, and keeps schema lineage inspectable across Web, MCP, and the database.
defaultPrompt: Use continue_prior_work when the user wants to keep going on the same subject and reuse prior memory
Use structure_subject when the user wants a subject profiled, organized, or mapped into structured fields
Use inspect_latest_changes when the user asks what changed, why it retried, or why the schema evolved
